nasb.text: The captain of the guard also took away the bowls, the firepans, the basins, the pots, the lampstands, the pans and the drink offering bowls, what was fine gold and what was fine silver.

esv.text: also the small bowls and the fire pans and the basins and the pots and the lampstands and the dishes for incense and the bowls for drink offerings. What was of gold the captain of the guard took away as gold, and what was of silver, as silver.

cnv.text: 此外，碗盆、火鼎、碗、鍋、燈臺、碟子和奠酒的爵，無論是金的或是銀的，護衛長都拿去了。

ccb.text: 护卫长还带走了杯、火鼎、碗、盆、灯台、碟和奠酒的杯等所有金银器皿。
